title: MoreFarming
description: A mod was maked looked like Stardew Valley
body:
# Overview
This mod adds the watering system of Xinglu Valley and agricultural planting content to the game.

# Module Characteristics

Four types of spray pots have been added for watering, and the planting pots are divided into two states: wet and dry.

In a dry state, watering can be done using a watering can to switch to a moist state. Both states can be used to plant original or modular crops, but for the crops in this module, only a moist planting pot can be used to plant and grow crops normally.

If the planting pot dries up during the growth period, the MoreFarming crops planted on it will stop growing.

# New crop
![Crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19f72cce722194c2992315d3bdebe848c7bff42c.png)
At present, there is no way to obtain seeds, suitable for mod plugin servers like Arclight to play

The crops currently added to the module

# Tools and props
![Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b99b7813be7e3265b097167e89a16bc4ff7fa49f.png)
Tools currently added to the module:
Kettle: can be used for watering
Iridium ingot: synthetic iridium pickaxe
Sprinkler: Automatic and Manual Sprinkler
Growth rate fertilizer: accelerates crop growth
Iridium pickaxe: Excavating ore and dropping raw ore

# Functional block
![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8ec162fa96e2e8a613f3b8a7229b4bf8664c3f4.png)

Planting pots: Planting MFI crops
Greenhouse glass: allowing crops to grow across seasons
# separate seasonal system
![Season](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31174d5a12549a6bbb4d187b01606c23052a1e52.png)
Change every 6 hours per season, with a reminder before the change;

The corresponding season will be displayed in the upper left corner. Currently, the module season system is separate and not affected by other season modules

The seeds will have a description of the suitable season for planting;

# Instructions added:
![command](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1a2f84e1f0a106562ac5282ab0704da6bd0b34f.png)
